texto: Japanese people accept that art and commerce will be blended; and, in fact, they are surprised by the rigid and pretentious Western hierarchy of 'high art.'
explicacao: Citação de Takashi Murakami sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Japanese people accept that art and commerce will be blended; and, in fact, they are surprised by…” articula reflexao, people, accept em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e accept.

frase_original: Japanese people accept that art and commerce will be blended; and, in fact, they are surprised by the rigid and pretentious Western hierarchy of 'high art.'

texto: When I was little, I guess I was just an ordinary kid. But then things changed when I was in junior high. You know, kids that become geeks become one because of something. Like, they aren't good at sports, or girls don't like them. I, too, for some reason, got into things like science fiction and, well, especially science fiction as an escape.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Takashi Murakami: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “When I was little, I guess I was just an ordinary kid. But then things changed when I was in juni…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, good, science pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e science.

frase_original: When I was little, I guess I was just an ordinary kid. But then things changed when I was in junior high. You know, kids that become geeks become one because of something. Like, they aren't good at sports, or girls don't like them. I, too, for some reason, got into things like science fiction and, well, especially science fiction as an escape.
